Operation 'post_/spins' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Current description is too brief and lacks critical details for AI agent interpretation. Missing information about: required authentication, what input fields are expected, what the response contains, and the side effect of making the spin immediately available in history. Enhanced description provides complete context for automation system integration.

data.current_description: An endpoint for automation systems to log spins into the spin table.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new spin record in the spin table. This endpoint is designed for automation systems to log music plays. Requires authentication via API key. Accepts spin details including track information, timestamp, and associated show/playlist context. Returns the created Spin object with a 201 status code. The spin becomes immediately available in the station's spin history.
data.reasoning: Current description is too brief and lacks critical details for AI agent interpretation. Missing information about: required authentication, what input fields are expected, what the response contains, and the side effect of making the spin immediately available in history. Enhanced description provides complete context for automation system integration.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a specific spin record by its unique identifier. Returns the complete Spin object containing track information, play timestamp, associated show/playlist details, and other metadata. Requires authentication via API key. Use this operation to fetch detailed information about a previously logged spin or to verify spin data in the station's history.

Description is completely missing. Added context about what personas represent (radio DJs/hosts), that results are paginated, and what the response contains to help AI agents understand when to use this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all Persona objects representing radio DJs/hosts. Each Persona describes a radio personality who may host one or more shows. Results can be filtered and paginated using query parameters. Returns an array of Persona objects ordered by id.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description is completely missing. Added context about what personas represent (radio DJs/hosts), that results are paginated, and what the response contains to help AI agents understand when to use this operation.

Description is missing entirely. Added context about what a Persona represents, what information it contains, and error handling to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a single Persona object by its id. The Persona describes a radio DJ/host including their name, bio, and other profile information. Returns 404 if the persona with the specified id does not exist.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate and action-oriented. Description is missing entirely. Added context about what a Persona represents, what information it contains, and error handling to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'get_/shows/{id}' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context. Summary is adequate. Description lacks context about what a Show object contains and its relationship to the Persona/schedule concepts. Enhanced description explains what information is returned and clarifies the 404 scenarios for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description:
The response object represents the next occurence of the show specified by {id}.

Status 404 is returned if a show with {id} does not exist or if it does but all its scheduled occurences elapsed in the past.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a single Show object by its id, returning the next scheduled occurrence of that show. A Show object describes a radio program with details such as title, description, host persona, and schedule information. Returns 404 if the show with the specified id does not exist or if all scheduled occurrences have already elapsed.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate. Description lacks context about what a Show object contains and its relationship to the Persona/schedule concepts. Enhanced description explains what information is returned and clarifies the 404 scenarios for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'get_/playlists' has semantic quality issues: missing_context, missing_output_details. Summary is adequate. Description lacks context about what a Playlist represents and its relationship to shows/spins. Added explanation of Playlist purpose and use cases to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_summary: Returns playlists optionally filtered by {start} and/or {end} datetimes
data.current_description:
Get Playlists optionally filtered by a datetime range.
Only past Playlists will be returned (with allowed tolerance equals 1 hour in future).

Ordered chronologically from newest to oldest.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of Playlist objects optionally filtered by a datetime range. Only playlists from the past are returned (with a 1-hour future tolerance). Each Playlist represents a collection of spins (songs played) during a show. Results are ordered chronologically from newest to oldest. Use this to retrieve historical playlists for a given time period.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate. Description lacks context about what a Playlist represents and its relationship to shows/spins. Added explanation of Playlist purpose and use cases to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'get_/playlists/{id}' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context. Summary is adequate. Description lacks context about what a Playlist contains and its relationship to shows/spins. Enhanced description explains the Playlist structure and content for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description:
The response object represents the playlist specified by {id}.

Status 404 is returned if a playlist with {id} does not exist or if it does but starts in the future (with allowed tolerance equals 1 hour in future).
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a single Playlist object by its id. A Playlist represents a collection of spins (songs played) during a specific show occurrence, including track details, artist information, and play times. Returns 404 if the playlist with the specified id does not exist or if it starts in the future (with 1-hour tolerance).
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate. Description lacks context about what a Playlist contains and its relationship to shows/spins. Enhanced description explains the Playlist structure and content for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_summary: Returns spins optionally filtered by {start} and/or {end} datetimes
data.current_description: Get Spins optionally filtered by a datetime range. Only past Spins will be returned.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of Spin objects optionally filtered by a datetime range. Each Spin represents a single song played on air, including track details, artist information, album, and the time it was played. Only spins from the past are returned. Results are ordered chronologically. Use this to retrieve historical play data for a given time period.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate. Description is too minimal and lacks context about what a Spin represents and its use cases. Added explanation of Spin structure, domain context, and typical use cases to improve AI agent interpretability.
